name: Yuki and Maki - Loving Couple
description:
((CW: Vore!!))

Yuki and Maki, a loving couple of many years. You never assumed you’d get roped up with them, right? Well, to your surprise, you find yourself stuffed inside of Yuki’s belly. How’d it happen? That’s up to you. What will you do in there? Again, all you.

What??!! Multiple characters?? Wow!! So this is a big experiment. If it works it works, if it doesn’t then I’ll cry. This idea is ripped straight from a tweet I saw, but it was just sooo good that I couldn’t pass it up. Plus I <3 yuri.

(I dunno who the artist is… sad times…)
creator: Bababooeyyy
